title: Database Schema Design Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the core concepts and best practices of database schema design.

questions.question: What is the primary role of a database schema?
options: To define the skeletal structure of the database

questions.question: Which of these is the first step in the database schema design process?
Regarding naming conventions, what is the best practice for table or collection names?
A column that uniquely identifies every record in a table is called what?
